backstory.original: Lae'zel is a ferocious Githyanki warrior, mighty even by the standards of her mind flayer-hunting kind. Faced with transforming into the very monster she's sworn to destroy, Lae'zel must prove herself worthy of rejoining her people - if they don't execute her first.
backstory.display: 莱埃泽尔是个凶猛的吉斯洋基战士，即使以她猎杀夺心魔的标准来看也很强大。她的人民变成了自己曾经发誓要消灭的怪物，莱埃泽尔必须在他们面前证明自己有资格重新加入他们--如果他们不先处决她的话。

description.original: Lae'zel attacks the closest enemies with a swing of her greatsword.
description.display: 莱埃泽尔挥起她的巨剑攻击最近的敌人。

description.original: Lae'zel leaps into the enemies and attacks, stunning them all for a short duration.
description.display: 莱埃泽尔跃向敌人并攻击，令所有敌人短暂眩晕。

longDescription.original: Lae'zel psionically leaps into the enemies and attacks with a psionic shockwave, stunning them all for a short duration.
longDescription.display: 莱埃泽尔跃向敌人并用一道灵能震荡波攻击，令所有敌人短暂眩晕。

description.original: Lae'zel increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.
description.display: 莱埃泽尔会提高她自己与同列所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: $source's base chance to Critical Hit is $(amount)%.
$source increases the damage of all Champions in her column by $(amount)%, including herself.
$source使她纵队中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，包括她自己。

tipText.original: Lae'zel increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.
tipText.display: 莱埃泽尔会提高她自己与同列所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in $source's brain. $source increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack, stacking multiplicatively.
$source大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层蜕变堆叠。每层蜕变使$source的$(upgrade_name id___2)效果提升 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

In non-boss areas, whenever an enemy is defeated by anything OTHER than $source, she has a $(amount)% chance to gain an Impatience stack. When she has $(max_stacks___2) Impatience stacks, complete the current area and reset the Impatience stacks to the current Ceremorphosis count. Stacks persist when changing areas.
在非首领区域，每当一名敌人被$source以外的角色击败时，她有 $(amount)% 几率获得一层“不耐烦”堆叠。当她拥有 $(max_stacks___2) 层“不耐烦”时，完成当前区域，并将“不耐烦”堆叠层数重置为与当前“蜕变”数量相等。改变区域时堆叠层数保持不变。

tipText.original: Lae'zel gets impatient when other Champions defeat enemies which results in her completing areas early.
tipText.display: 其他勇士击败敌人时，莱埃泽尔会变得不耐烦，并加快她完成区域的速度。

description.desc: Aberrations are $source's Favored Foe. Every time an Aberration spawns, $source's $(upgrade_name id___2) is multiplicatively increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking up to $(max_stack_mult___3) times the Ceremorphosis stack count and resetting when changing areas. There is a $(amount___4)% chance with each wave in a non-boss area that an extra Mind Flayer spawns.
异怪是$source的偏好对手。每次刷新一个异怪时，$source的$(upgrade_name id___2)效果乘算增加 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，堆叠上限为“蜕变”堆叠数量的 $(max_stack_mult___3) 倍，改变区域时重置。在非首领区域的每一波都有 $(amount___4)% 几率额外刷新一个夺心魔。
If $source attacks and any of her targets survive, her base attack cooldown for her next attack is reduced by $(amount) seconds.
如果$source进行攻击，且有目标存活，她下一次攻击的基本攻击冷却时间减少 $(amount) 秒。
Increases $source's Critical Hit chance by $(amount)% (additively) and Critical Hit damage by $(amount___2)% (multiplicatively).
$source的暴击几率提升 $(amount)%（加算堆叠），暴击伤害提升 $(amount___2)%（乘算堆叠）。

specializationDescription.original: Lae'zel becomes a Champion, increasing the chance and damage of her critical hits.
specializationDescription.display: 莱埃泽尔变成勇士，提高她的暴击率和暴击伤害。

description.desc: When $source hits an enemy and they survive, the enemy is distracted and the next Champion (other than $source) that hits them deals an additional $(amount) seconds of BUD-based damage.
当$source击中敌人且敌人存活时，该敌人会被分散注意力，下一位勇士（$source以外的勇士）击中该敌人会造成额外 $(amount) 秒的基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Lae'zel's attacks distract enemies, causing the next attack that hits them to do massive damage.
specializationDescription.display: 莱埃泽尔的攻击会使敌人分心，使下一次命中该敌人的攻击造成大量伤害。

description.desc: $source now casts Magic Missile immediately after attacking with her greatsword, firing a missile at 3 random targets.
$source现在会在使用她的巨剑攻击后立刻发射魔法飞弹，袭向 3 个随机目标。

specializationDescription.original: Lae'zel becomes an Eldritch Knight, allowing her to cast Magic Missile after each of her Greatsword attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 莱埃泽尔变成一名奥法骑士，使她可以在每次巨剑攻击后施放魔法飞弹。

description.original: I do not brawl in taverns, but I will run you through for interrupting my drink.
description.display: 我不在酒馆里打架，但你要是打扰我喝酒，我会把你打趴下。

description.original: Let me out of this cage and I won't need weapons to end you.
description.display: 把我从笼子里放出去，我不用武器就能解决你。

description.original: Selflessness is weakness.
description.display: 无私是一种软弱。

description.original: Follow me if you want. I will not be responsible for your deaths.
description.display: 想跟着我的话就来吧。我不对你们的生死负责。

description.original: Shadowheart is slow to detect danger, and even slower to react. It will be the death of her.
description.display: 影心对危险木知木觉，反应速度就更不值一提了。她必死无疑。

description.original: Astarion is the only one among you who understands that success requires strategy.
description.display: 阿斯代伦是你们中唯一明白成功需要策略这个道理的人。

description.original: This power from the vile ghaik slug seems to be increasing.
description.display: 邪恶夺心魔蛞蝓的这股力量似乎越来越强大了。

description.original: The power is useful, but it is a stain in my mind.
description.display: 这力量很有用，但在我心中它是一个污点。

description.original: There is no time for this -- there are ghaik to slay!
description.display: 没时间聊天了--得去杀夺心魔！

description.original: I will leave you behind! Get moving!
description.display: 跟不上我就把你丢下了！动作快！

description.original: Vlaakith demands the death of all ghaik.
description.display: 弗拉基丝要所有夺心魔都死掉。

description.original: You would be wise to watch my movements, Tav. I am a true warrior.
description.display: 你最好仔细观察我的动作，塔夫。我是真正的战士。

description.original: I will only find honor when I present Vlaakith with the head of a slain ghaik.
description.display: 只有向弗拉基丝献上我杀死的夺心魔头颅时，我才会感到荣耀。

description.original: Knowledge of your enemy is as useful as the weapon in your hand.
description.display: 对敌人的了解跟你手中的武器一样有用。

description.original: You have proven yourself worthy of my trust. For now.
description.display: 你证明了你值得我信任，至少现在是这样。

description.original: Vlaakith gha'g shkath zai!
description.display: 为了弗拉基丝的荣耀！

description.original: A blade is only as sharp as the one who wields it.
description.display: 刀刃的锋利程度，取决于挥舞它的人。

description.original: They must ALL be destroyed, no matter the costs.
description.display: 必须不惜代价，把它们全部消灭。

description.original: A gift from my sa'varsh. I used them to survive my first of many raids.
description.display: 我的照料人送我的礼物。借助它们，我才在第一次突袭中存活下来。

description.original: A fellow initiate called these blades 'insufficient'. The wounds they left on his forehead prove otherwise.
description.display: 某个新人说这些剑“不堪大用”。它们在他额头上留下的伤口恰是反面证明。

description.original: This will help me bring a ghaik head to my Undying Queen.
description.display: 这可以帮我把夺心魔的头颅送给我的不死女王。

description.original: Each bolt is enchanted to seek out the brain of a ghaik and destroy it.
description.display: 每支弩箭上都施了寻找并摧毁夺心魔脑子的魔法。

description.original: The edge may be dull, but it will cleave my foes open all the same.
description.display: 虽然剑刃驽钝，但它照样能将我的敌人开膛破肚。

description.original: Each mark on this blade is a lesson I learned on Crèche K'liir.
description.display: 这把剑上的每一道伤痕都是我在克雷奇·克利尔那里学到的教训。

description.original: One day I will wield a true silver sword in Vlaakith's name.
description.display: 有朝一日，我将以弗拉基丝之名，挥舞真正的银剑。

description.original: Within this blade lives the whole of the empire's might!
description.display: 这把剑蕴藏着帝国的全部威力！

description.original: A mere trinket.
description.display: 一件小饰品。

description.original: A simple memento of the crèche I once called home.
description.display: 一个简陋的纪念品，纪念曾被我称为家的养育所。

description.original: Said to be found only in Tu'narath, the City of Death.
description.display: 据说只会出现在死亡之城图纳拉斯。

description.original: The engraving on the back reads: 'Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht'
description.display: 背面刻着：“Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht”

description.original: Discarded attire from Crèche K'liir - a hand-me-down from the varsh.
description.display: 克利尔养育所的废弃服装--照料人给我的旧衣。

description.original: Ceremonial garments, passed from the undead tl'a'ikith who wore them in life.
description.display: 仪式服装，由生前穿着它们的亡灵剑灵传承下来。

description.original: The armor of a githyanki warrior is unmatched.
description.display: 吉斯洋基战士的盔甲是无可比拟的。

description.original: To wear this armour atop a red dragon steed is my duty and my destiny!
description.display: 穿上这套盔甲登上红龙坐骑--这是我的职责，也是我的宿命！

description.original: Tsk'va! I hate these things.
description.display: 该死！我讨厌这种鞋。

description.original: Training on Crèche K'liir with these was close to torture.
description.display: 在克雷奇·克利尔上穿着这种鞋训练简直是折磨。

description.original: With one sturdy stomp, I could crush a ghaik's abominable skull.
description.display: 只要用力一踩，我就能碾碎夺心魔的丑陋头骨。

description.original: With these, I can walk amongst the stars and hunt ghaik wherever they hide.
description.display: 有了这双鞋，我就能在群星之间走动，猎杀躲在任何地方的夺心魔。

description.original: I snatched this from the ruins of a githyanki temple. It holds but a trace of psionic magic.
description.display: 我从一座吉斯洋基神庙遗迹里拿到的。它残存着一丝灵能魔法。

description.original: The magic within this crown reeks of shadow. I call upon it at my own peril.
description.display: 这顶王冠蕴藏的魔力散发着暗影的气息。使用它的后果，我需自己承担。

description.original: The spoils of a victorious raid. They serve their purpose more than adequately.
description.display: 某次胜利突袭的战利品。它们早已物尽其用。

description.original: With this, the shadows bow to me.
description.display: 有了这个，暗影都将臣服于我。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Githyanki Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Lae'zel is a ferocious Githyanki warrior, mighty even by the standards of her mind flayer-hunting kind. Faced with transforming into the very monster she's sworn to destroy, Lae'zel must prove herself worthy of rejoining her people - if they don't execute her first.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Lae'zel is a Support, Speed, and DPS Champion that can complete areas early when other Champions are defeating enemies.

event_upgrades.name: Lethal Coordination
event_upgrades.description: Lae'zel increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 莱埃泽尔是个凶猛的吉斯洋基战士，即使以她猎杀夺心魔的标准来看也很强大。她的人民变成了自己曾经发誓要消灭的怪物，莱埃泽尔必须在他们面前证明自己有资格重新加入他们--如果他们不先处决她的话。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 莱埃泽尔是支援、速度和伤害输出型勇士，可以在其他勇士击败敌人时提前完成区域。

event_upgrades.name: 致命配合
event_upgrades.description: 莱埃泽尔会提高她自己与同列所有勇士的伤害。

original.name: Greatsword
original.description: Lae'zel attacks the closest enemies with a swing of her greatsword.

display.name: 巨剑
display.description: 莱埃泽尔挥起她的巨剑攻击最近的敌人。

original.name: Psionic Leap
original.description: Lae'zel leaps into the enemies and attacks, stunning them all for a short duration.
original.long_description: Lae'zel psionically leaps into the enemies and attacks with a psionic shockwave, stunning them all for a short duration.

display.name: 灵能飞跃
display.description: 莱埃泽尔跃向敌人并攻击，令所有敌人短暂眩晕。
display.long_description: 莱埃泽尔跃向敌人并用一道灵能震荡波攻击，令所有敌人短暂眩晕。

original.name: Lethal Coordination
original.tip_text: Lae'zel increases the damage of all Champions in her column, including herself.

display.name: 致命配合
display.tip_text: 莱埃泽尔会提高她自己与同列所有勇士的伤害。

original.name: Straight to the Point
original.tip_text: Lae'zel gets impatient when other Champions defeat enemies which results in her completing areas early.

display.name: 单刀直入
display.tip_text: 其他勇士击败敌人时，莱埃泽尔会变得不耐烦，并加快她完成区域的速度。

original.name: Champion
original.specialization_description: Lae'zel becomes a Champion, increasing the chance and damage of her critical hits.

display.name: 勇士
display.specialization_description: 莱埃泽尔变成勇士，提高她的暴击率和暴击伤害。

original.name: Battle Master
original.specialization_description: Lae'zel's attacks distract enemies, causing the next attack that hits them to do massive damage.

display.name: 战斗大师
display.specialization_description: 莱埃泽尔的攻击会使敌人分心，使下一次命中该敌人的攻击造成大量伤害。

original.name: Eldritch Knight
original.specialization_description: Lae'zel becomes an Eldritch Knight, allowing her to cast Magic Missile after each of her Greatsword attacks.

display.name: 奥法骑士
display.specialization_description: 莱埃泽尔变成一名奥法骑士，使她可以在每次巨剑攻击后施放魔法飞弹。

original.name: Tavern Brawler
original.description: I do not brawl in taverns, but I will run you through for interrupting my drink.

display.name: 旅店打手
display.description: 我不在酒馆里打架，但你要是打扰我喝酒，我会把你打趴下。

original.name: Grappler
original.description: Let me out of this cage and I won't need weapons to end you.

display.name: 擒抱者
display.description: 把我从笼子里放出去，我不用武器就能解决你。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Selflessness is weakness.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 无私是一种软弱。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Follow me if you want. I will not be responsible for your deaths.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 想跟着我的话就来吧。我不对你们的生死负责。

original.name: Lethal Timing
original.description: Shadowheart is slow to detect danger, and even slower to react. It will be the death of her.

display.name: 致命时机
display.description: 影心对危险木知木觉，反应速度就更不值一提了。她必死无疑。

original.name: Lethal Tactics
original.description: Astarion is the only one among you who understands that success requires strategy.

display.name: 致命战术
display.description: 阿斯代伦是你们中唯一明白成功需要策略这个道理的人。

original.name: Stygian Vigor
original.description: This power from the vile ghaik slug seems to be increasing.

display.name: 阴暗活力
display.description: 邪恶夺心魔蛞蝓的这股力量似乎越来越强大了。

original.name: Eldritch Empowerment
original.description: The power is useful, but it is a stain in my mind.

display.name: 魔能强化
display.description: 这力量很有用，但在我心中它是一个污点。

original.name: No Time to Explain
original.description: There is no time for this -- there are ghaik to slay!

display.name: 没时间解释了
display.description: 没时间聊天了--得去杀夺心魔！

original.name: Hurry Up!
original.description: I will leave you behind! Get moving!

display.name: 快！
display.description: 跟不上我就把你丢下了！动作快！

original.name: Aberrant Slayer
original.description: Vlaakith demands the death of all ghaik.

display.name: 畸变克星
display.description: 弗拉基丝要所有夺心魔都死掉。

original.name: Battle Expertise
original.description: You would be wise to watch my movements, Tav. I am a true warrior.

display.name: 战斗专长
display.description: 你最好仔细观察我的动作，塔夫。我是真正的战士。

original.name: Cataclysmic Strike
original.description: I will only find honor when I present Vlaakith with the head of a slain ghaik.

display.name: 致命猛击
display.description: 只有向弗拉基丝献上我杀死的夺心魔头颅时，我才会感到荣耀。

original.name: Scholar
original.description: Knowledge of your enemy is as useful as the weapon in your hand.

display.name: 学者
display.description: 对敌人的了解跟你手中的武器一样有用。

original.name: Absolute Trust
original.description: You have proven yourself worthy of my trust. For now.

display.name: 绝对信任
display.description: 你证明了你值得我信任，至少现在是这样。

original.name: Queen's Blade
original.description: Vlaakith gha'g shkath zai!

display.name: 女王之刃
display.description: 为了弗拉基丝的荣耀！

original.name: Master's Precision
original.description: A blade is only as sharp as the one who wields it.

display.name: 大师精度
display.description: 刀刃的锋利程度，取决于挥舞它的人。

original.name: Bane of Ghaik
original.description: They must ALL be destroyed, no matter the costs.

display.name: 夺心魔克星
display.description: 必须不惜代价，把它们全部消灭。

original.name: Raiding Daggers
original.description: A gift from my sa'varsh. I used them to survive my first of many raids.

display.name: 突袭匕首
display.description: 我的照料人送我的礼物。借助它们，我才在第一次突袭中存活下来。

original.name: Balanced Blades
original.description: A fellow initiate called these blades 'insufficient'. The wounds they left on his forehead prove otherwise.

display.name: 协调利刃
display.description: 某个新人说这些剑“不堪大用”。它们在他额头上留下的伤口恰是反面证明。

original.name: Ghaik Slayer
original.description: This will help me bring a ghaik head to my Undying Queen.

display.name: 夺心魔克星
display.description: 这可以帮我把夺心魔的头颅送给我的不死女王。

original.name: Mind Seeker
original.description: Each bolt is enchanted to seek out the brain of a ghaik and destroy it.

display.name: 心灵探索者
display.description: 每支弩箭上都施了寻找并摧毁夺心魔脑子的魔法。

original.name: Training Weapon
original.description: The edge may be dull, but it will cleave my foes open all the same.

display.name: 训练武器
display.description: 虽然剑刃驽钝，但它照样能将我的敌人开膛破肚。

original.name: Battle Damaged Sword
original.description: Each mark on this blade is a lesson I learned on Crèche K'liir.

display.name: 战损剑
display.description: 这把剑上的每一道伤痕都是我在克雷奇·克利尔那里学到的教训。

original.name: Greatsword
original.description: One day I will wield a true silver sword in Vlaakith's name.

display.name: 巨剑
display.description: 有朝一日，我将以弗拉基丝之名，挥舞真正的银剑。

original.name: Githyanki Silver Sword
original.description: Within this blade lives the whole of the empire's might!

display.name: 吉斯洋基银剑
display.description: 这把剑蕴藏着帝国的全部威力！

original.name: Raiding Prize
original.description: A mere trinket.

display.name: 掠夺奖品
display.description: 一件小饰品。

original.name: Memory of the Tears
original.description: A simple memento of the crèche I once called home.

display.name: 眼泪回忆
display.description: 一个简陋的纪念品，纪念曾被我称为家的养育所。

original.name: Aether Shards
original.description: Said to be found only in Tu'narath, the City of Death.

display.name: 乙太碎片
display.description: 据说只会出现在死亡之城图纳拉斯。

original.name: Token of Vlaakith
original.description: The engraving on the back reads: 'Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht'

display.name: 弗拉基丝的信物
display.description: 背面刻着：“Vlaakith'ka sivim hrath krash'ht”

original.name: Ornate Garb
original.description: Discarded attire from Crèche K'liir - a hand-me-down from the varsh.

display.name: 华丽衣装
display.description: 克利尔养育所的废弃服装--照料人给我的旧衣。

original.name: Ancient Adornment
original.description: Ceremonial garments, passed from the undead tl'a'ikith who wore them in life.

display.name: 远古装饰品
display.description: 仪式服装，由生前穿着它们的亡灵剑灵传承下来。

original.name: Githyanki Mail
original.description: The armor of a githyanki warrior is unmatched.

display.name: 吉斯洋基锁子甲
display.description: 吉斯洋基战士的盔甲是无可比拟的。

original.name: Dragonrider Armour
original.description: To wear this armour atop a red dragon steed is my duty and my destiny!

display.name: 龙骑士盔甲
display.description: 穿上这套盔甲登上红龙坐骑--这是我的职责，也是我的宿命！

original.name: Leather Sandals
original.description: Tsk'va! I hate these things.

display.name: 皮凉鞋
display.description: 该死！我讨厌这种鞋。

original.name: Well Used Sandals
original.description: Training on Crèche K'liir with these was close to torture.

display.name: 老旧凉鞋
display.description: 在克雷奇·克利尔上穿着这种鞋训练简直是折磨。

original.name: Half Plate Boots
original.description: With one sturdy stomp, I could crush a ghaik's abominable skull.

display.name: 半板甲靴子
display.description: 只要用力一踩，我就能碾碎夺心魔的丑陋头骨。

original.name: Astral Striders
original.description: With these, I can walk amongst the stars and hunt ghaik wherever they hide.

display.name: 星界跨越者
display.description: 有了这双鞋，我就能在群星之间走动，猎杀躲在任何地方的夺心魔。

original.name: Unidentified Crown
original.description: I snatched this from the ruins of a githyanki temple. It holds but a trace of psionic magic.

display.name: 不明头冠
display.description: 我从一座吉斯洋基神庙遗迹里拿到的。它残存着一丝灵能魔法。

original.name: Ancient Crown
original.description: The magic within this crown reeks of shadow. I call upon it at my own peril.

display.name: 远古头冠
display.description: 这顶王冠蕴藏的魔力散发着暗影的气息。使用它的后果，我需自己承担。

original.name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
original.description: The spoils of a victorious raid. They serve their purpose more than adequately.

display.name: 铲除飞弹手套
display.description: 某次胜利突袭的战利品。它们早已物尽其用。

original.name: Sunwalker's Gift
original.description: With this, the shadows bow to me.

display.name: 日行者的馈赠
display.description: 有了这个，暗影都将臣服于我。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Githyanki Champions by $(amount)%
所有吉斯洋基人勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位敏捷大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位近战勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
